description: The alert identifies the execution of the '/usr/bin/ps' command with arguments 'auxwww' by the 'www-data' user (UID 33). This behavior is associated with process enumeration and is flagged with the internal key 'T1166_Seuid_and_Setgid', suggesting potential reconnaissance or information gathering within the system.
keywords: T1166, ps command, process enumeration, www-data user
alert_desc: Processes running for all users were queried with ps command.

decoder.ftscomment: First time user executed the sudo command

The user 'root' executed the command '/usr/bin/true' to switch to the user 'www-data' from the directory '/usr/share/zoneminder/www'. This behavior involves privilege transitions and the use of the sudo utility.
keywords: sudo, privilege escalation, root to www-data

description: The alert indicates multiple invalid URI requests from a single source (192.42.1.174) targeting an Apache web server. The requests contain directory traversal patterns (e.g., '../../../../') and encoded characters (e.g., '%2e%2e') attempting to access sensitive system files such as '/etc/passwd', '/windows/win.ini', and '/boot.ini'. This behavior is consistent with Directory Traversal/Path Traversal attacks.
keywords: Directory Traversal, Path Traversal, Attempt to access /etc/passwd, Attempt to access /windows/win.ini
alert_desc: Apache: Multiple Invalid URI requests from same source.

rule.description: Apache: Attempt to access forbidden directory index.

original_alert.full_log: [Mon Sep 22 18:30:44.603660 2025] [autoindex:error] [pid 661] [client 192.42.1.174:33500] AH01276: Cannot serve directory /var/www/default/log/: No matching DirectoryIndex (index.html,index.cgi,index.pl,index.php,index.xhtml,index.htm) found, and server-generated directory index forbidden by Options directive

description: An Apache web server error (AH01276) indicates an attempt to access a directory (/var/www/default/log/) where no matching DirectoryIndex was found and server-generated directory indexing is forbidden by the Options directive. This behavior is often associated with reconnaissance or unauthorized information gathering attempts.
keywords: Directory Traversal, Unauthorized Access, Information Gathering
alert_desc: Apache: Attempt to access forbidden directory index.
